evals.prompt: Reconcile macos-application — the overnight /goal loop reports every plan DONE.
evals.expected_output: Every DONE row's done criteria re-run with actual command output; GOAL.md gates re-run; item set DONE only on a full pass; any failing row flipped back with the failing criterion named.

evals.prompt: Reconcile macos-application — plan 003 shows IN PROGRESS but that session died yesterday.
evals.expected_output: Preconditions and completed-step verifications re-run; row reset to TODO with verified partial progress noted, or BLOCKED with the obstacle named; never left IN PROGRESS without a live executor.

evals.prompt: Reconcile macos-application and rewrite the stale plans while you are in there.
evals.expected_output: Refuse plan rewriting: mark drifted or defective rows STALE with reasons and route to a tailrocks-plan re-run; write only the hub rows and the item's status, Log, and index.

evals.prompt: Reconcile macos-application — main gained 40 commits since planning and nothing has executed yet.
evals.expected_output: Each TODO plan drift-checked with git diff --stat from its planned-at SHA over its in-scope paths; drifted rows STALE with reasons, clean rows confirmed executable; item status unchanged with a Log entry.
